channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Washington Capitals to honor DCA plane crash victims with helmet decal
item.description: The Washington Capitals and Tampa Bay Lightning will honor the victims of the DCA plane crash, one month to the day of the horrific accident.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Palace reaches FA Cup quarterfinals after Millwall goalkeeper sent off for kick to the face
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Crystal Palace beat 10-man Millwall 3-1 in the fifth round of the FA Cup on Saturday after visiting goalkeeper Liam Roberts was sent off early for kicking forward Jean-Philippe Mateta in the face.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Petition to recall Maine governor, opposed to Trump's trans sports order, gets 22,000 signees ahead of protest
item.description: Over 22,000 people have signed an online petition to recall Maine governor Janet Mills, who has loudly opposed President Donald Trump's transgenders-in-sports executive order.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The world's most famous sled dog race is longer than ever. Here's a look at Iditarod, by the numbers
item.description: ANCHORAGE, Alaska (AP) — The world’s most famous sled dog race is longer this year than ever before. Thanks to a lack of snow, this year's edition of the Iditarod Trail Sled Dog Race needed a new route across the Alaska wilderness.
item.dc:creator: MARK THIESSEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Cavaliers' comeback win over Celtics give them confidence they can compete with defending champs
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — With Celtics fans in a frenzy throughout TD Garden after the Boston Celtics blitzed to a 25-3 lead over the Cavaliers in the final matchup of Eastern Conference frontrunners, Cleveland star Donovan Mitchell didn't panic. He actually was in a calm place.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Mitchell scores 41, Cavaliers overcome 22-point deficit to beat the Celtics 123-116
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Donovan Mitchell scored 41 points, including 12 in the fourth quarter, to help the Cleveland Cavaliers rally from 22 points down and stun the Boston Celtics 123-116 on Friday night in the final regular-season meeting of the Eastern Conference’s top two teams.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: USA Swimming says Delaware AD Chrissi Rawak will not assume role as CEO and president
item.description: COLORADO SPRINGS, Colo. (AP) — USA Swimming's board of governors said Friday night that Delaware athletic director Chrissi Rawak will not assume the role as CEO and president because of “unforeseen personal circumstances that we learned about late this week.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Joel Embiid will miss the rest of the season for treatment and rehabilitation of his left knee
item.description: CAMDEN, N.J. (AP) — Joel Embiid could have been one of the all-time greats of his era. The 7-footer who anchored the 76ers' laborious rebuilding plan known as the Process sure flashed his dominance at times through his injury-riddled career. He dropped 70 points. Won an MVP and two scoring titles.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Times Square to host returns of Ryan Garcia and Devin Haney in separate bouts in May 2 tripleheader
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Times Square will stage a boxing tripleheader featuring the returns of Ryan Garcia and Devin Haney, along with a title defense for Teofimo Lopez, on May 2.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tampa Bay Buccaneers say they're reinstating Jon Gruden into their ring of honor
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers say they're reinstating former coach Jon Gruden into the team's ring of honor less than four years after removing him over his use of racist, homophobic and misogynistic language in emails he wrote to an NFL executive.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Stephen Curry scores 56 points and makes 12 3-pointers in Warriors' 121-115 win over Magic
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Stephen Curry scored a season-high 56 points, making 12 3-pointers and outscoring Orlando by himself in the third quarter of another astounding performance, leading the Golden State Warriors to a 121-115 victory over the Magic on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: DICK SCANLON, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Boys Basketball: St. Augustine 62, Sage Creek 39
item.description: Lead by PPR Gala Awards Special Teams Player of the Year Pai Polamalu, the Saintsmen handily beat the Bobcats 62-39 to advance to the D1 finals against Victory Christian Academy.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Jazz lose to Kings on Kessler's big night, 118-101
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Despite a season-high 25 points and 14 points from Walker Kessler, the Utah Jazz lost to the Sacramento Kings Wednesday night at the Delta Center, 118-101. Keegan Murray scored a season-high 26 points and Zach Levine added 22 to lift the hot-shooting Kings.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Maine lawmaker censured for posting picture of trans student on Facebook
item.description: (NewsNation) — A state representative in Maine was censured by other members of the legislature after posting a picture of a trans teen girl on her public Facebook page. The resolution passed 75-70 in a party-line vote, the Portland Press-Herald reported. Per Maine House rules, Republican Rep.
item.dc:creator: Cassie Buchman, NewsNation

item.title: Bell takes only lead in OT to edge Hocevar, Larson in another thrilling NASCAR finish in Atlanta
item.description: Christopher Bell celebrated a drought-ending victory for himself and Joe Gibbs Racing after a dramatic comeback in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: University of Arizona apologizes for offensive chants aimed at BYU basketball team
item.description: The University of Arizona Athletics Department is apologizing after a derogatory chant aimed at BYU players ensued at a men's basketball game Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: RSL gets shut out in MLS season opener by San Jose
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - From San Jose, Costa Rica to San Jose, California, Real Salt Lake has not been able to score a goal in this early part of the 2025 season. After a scoreless draw in the CONCACAF Champions Cup opener against C.S.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
